h6877bc5fg95bfg49e0g9ac0g371342ce6ae1: I hope we get to leave soon. I'm tired of living in a cave.
hb3d79738g5c93g4c28g966cg0f0237305b55: You saved us! Just like Baldy Ron.
h5a512066g3717g4546g8fbdg23e17c3890b3: I told everyone you'll save us. I know you will.
h12bb0f83gd727g4783g892fge1265613866b: Shh - you need to listen or go away.
h6242a991gb8e2g4082gb4fagb2803947cf70: I'm telling a story - it's rude to interrupt.
h1a684c0cg63c5g478cg9bfcg3cc2ee7316fe: Shh - you have to listen to the story.
hd688afbbg90a1g485eg8f77g44b3195b7c15: The Harpy Killer! Are you here to save us? Like Baldy Ron saved the city?
hcda3a9d0gbaddg47d0ga1dagdb6397043a45: Are you here to save us? Like Baldy Ron saved the city?
h2ebaf46eg2680g4e8bg9e62g2bb43e4c2aad: He saved Baldur's Gate and became a hero!
h7e4ff220gb5d5g4517g89b8g7e9b8700d10b: That is exactly what I'm here for.
hb6dd93bcgb1fdg4466gb588gd0503690847b: Good. And after, the lady can tell us stories about you.
hc8d68559g62d4g4b9dg9748g75fff74455b0: I risked my life for you once. I'm not planning to do it again.
ha40afe6eg9aafg40c7gb5cfg48b98ac9c1f1: But... you can win. Goblins aren't as strong as bird women, right? They can't even fly.
hb65b575agc54bg41b6gb03cgc7545aafbac7: You're not worth the trouble, kid. You're on your own.
hd9aa69bbg5496g428eg8b44g2d3a0e50edac: But... didn't you kill those goblins at the gate? You can win. I know you can!
ha4edb0a1g0ccdg43f4ga2fdg0a067769c632: You mean Balduran. He sailed to the edge of the world.
hf8f26ffeg9bb6g48dfg8bccg8b1bf3be5953: He did? I wonder what he found...
h88764194gd605g4d63g8f87g143190b350dc: Do you mean Balduran, the legendary founder of Baldur's Gate?
hb60ac228g695cg486egbd2bgee800cc39fe6: What's a founder? The lady said he saved Baldur's Gate and became a hero!
